nodes.label: AI as research assistant for source gathering and summarization
nodes.label_negative: AI as unreliable hallucinator requiring verification
nodes.grounding_span: I dont trust AI to pull completely factual research on its own so im trying to make sure its not hallucinating by going straight to the source first

nodes.label: AI as time-saving tool for operational tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI as time-wasting error-prone tool for creative tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I use it to shorten the amount of time I spend gathering and compiling research

nodes.label: Human creative control over writing and ideation
nodes.label_negative: AI outsourcing of creative and writing tasks
nodes.grounding_span: id prefer to handle all creative and writing steps myself

nodes.label: AI as collaborative iterative partner requiring oversight
nodes.grounding_span: I always have a back and forth. I review the work at each step and reiterate what is needed

nodes.label: Workplace encouragement of AI adoption for efficiency
nodes.label_negative: Workplace pressure leading to skill loss and over-reliance
nodes.grounding_span: we are encouraged to try new tools and approaches to save time and streamline processes

nodes.label: AI as learning tool to demonstrate human superiority
nodes.label_negative: AI as threat to skill maintenance and human interaction
nodes.grounding_span: I think using AI is a good way to learn and then demonstrate the things I still do better than a LLM

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: shorten the amount of time I spend gathering and compiling research

nodes.label: Creative autonomy and personal expression
nodes.grounding_span: I like writing, its my favorite part of my job and I don't want to outsource it

nodes.label: Skill preservation and professional growth
nodes.grounding_span: I also try to use it sparingly so I don't lose my ability to say, brainstorm on my own or conduct proper research

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for summarization and defense
nodes.grounding_span: I felt particularly satisfied when I used AI to pull information from a lengthy deck into relevant bullet points for my task

nodes.label: Frustration with AI image generation failure
nodes.grounding_span: I asked ChatGPT to create an image and it kept repeating my ask saying 'I have done [insert ask]' but it didn't do anything even remotely close

nodes.label: Fear of over-reliance and skill loss
nodes.grounding_span: Im afraid i will be asked to use it too much and lose my skills

nodes.label: Preference for human creative control
nodes.grounding_span: id prefer to handle all creative and writing steps myself

nodes.label: Iterative verification and back-and-forth refinement
nodes.grounding_span: I always have a back and forth. I review the work at each step and reiterate what is needed

nodes.label: Selective sparing use to maintain skills
nodes.grounding_span: I also try to use it sparingly so I don't lose my ability to say, brainstorm on my own or conduct proper research
